content: python-telegram-bot latest is v22.8, asyncio-native since v20.0, requires Python 3.10+, depends on httpx 0.27-0.29 as its default HTTP backend. Full-featured but heavier than needed for a one-way outbound alert; for pure send-only alerting, a raw httpx.post to the Bot API sendMessage endpoint is simpler and avoids an extra dependency; the library becomes worthwhile only if v2 adds interactive bot commands (e.g. confirm/deny sweep).
